mapper.select: SELECT p.project_id AS "projectId", p.project_name AS "projectName", p.identifier AS "identifier", p.owner_id AS "ownerId" FROM project p WHERE p.owner_id = #{ownerId} ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.project_name

SELECT pg.project_group_id AS "projectGroupId", pg.project_id AS "projectId", pg.role_id AS "roleId", pg.group_name AS "groupName", pg.group_answer AS "groupAnswer",
p.project_name AS "projectName",
r.role_name AS "roleName",
COUNT(pm.project_member_id) AS "memberCount" FROM project p JOIN project_group pg ON p.project_id = pg.project_id LEFT JOIN role r ON pg.role_id = r.role_id LEFT JOIN project_member pm ON pg.project_group_id = pm.project_group_id WHERE p.owner_id = #{ownerId}
AND p.project_id IN
#{projectId}
AND pg.group_name LIKE '%' || #{groupName} || '%'
AND r.role_name LIKE '%' || #{roleName} || '%'
GROUP BY pg.project_group_id, pg.project_id, pg.role_id, pg.group_name, pg.group_answer, p.project_name, r.role_name ORDER BY p.project_name, pg.group_name
SELECT r.role_id AS "roleId", r.role_name AS "roleName" FROM role r WHERE r.created_by = #{ownerId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.role_name
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'PROJECT_GROUP_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '_' || LPAD( NVL( MAX( TO_NUMBER( REGEXP_SUBSTR(project_group_id, '[0-9]+$') ) ), 0 ) + 1, 4, '0' ) FROM project_group WHERE project_group_id LIKE 'PROJECT_GROUP_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '_%'
INSERT INTO project_group ( project_group_id, project_id, role_id, group_name, group_answer ) VALUES ( #{projectGroupId}, #{projectId}, #{roleId}, #{groupName}, #{groupAnswer, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select:
SELECT pg.project_group_id AS "projectGroupId", pg.project_id AS "projectId", pg.role_id AS "roleId", pg.group_name AS "groupName", pg.group_answer AS "groupAnswer",
p.project_name AS "projectName", p.owner_id AS "ownerId",
r.role_name AS "roleName",
COUNT(pm.project_member_id) AS "memberCount" FROM project_group pg JOIN project p ON pg.project_id = p.project_id LEFT JOIN role r ON pg.role_id = r.role_id LEFT JOIN project_member pm ON pg.project_group_id = pm.project_group_id WHERE pg.project_group_id = #{projectGroupId} AND p.owner_id = #{ownerId} GROUP BY pg.project_group_id, pg.project_id, pg.role_id, pg.group_name, pg.group_answer, p.project_name, p.owner_id, r.role_name

SELECT pm.project_member_id AS "projectMemberId", pm.project_id AS "projectId", pm.project_group_id AS "projectGroupId", pm.team_member_id AS "teamMemberId",
tm.team_id AS "teamId", t.team_name AS "teamName",
u.user_id AS "userId", u.login_id AS "loginId", u.user_name AS "userName", u.email AS "email", u.phone AS "phone",
pg.group_name AS "groupName" FROM project_group pg JOIN project p ON pg.project_id = p.project_id JOIN project_member pm ON pg.project_group_id = pm.project_group_id JOIN team_member tm ON pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id JOIN users u ON tm.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN team t ON tm.team_id = t.team_id WHERE pg.project_group_id = #{projectGroupId} AND p.owner_id = #{ownerId} ORDER BY t.team_name, u.user_name

SELECT pm.project_member_id AS "projectMemberId", pm.project_id AS "projectId", pm.project_group_id AS "projectGroupId", pm.team_member_id AS "teamMemberId",
tm.team_id AS "teamId", t.team_name AS "teamName",
u.user_id AS "userId", u.login_id AS "loginId", u.user_name AS "userName", u.email AS "email", u.phone AS "phone" FROM project_group pg JOIN project p ON pg.project_id = p.project_id JOIN project_member pm ON p.project_id = pm.project_id JOIN team_member tm ON pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id JOIN users u ON tm.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN team t ON tm.team_id = t.team_id WHERE pg.project_group_id = #{projectGroupId} AND p.owner_id = #{ownerId} AND pm.project_group_id IS NULL AND u.user_id != #{ownerId} ORDER BY t.team_name, u.user_name
